pass_context.rf14_definition: RF-14 flags: references to substance use, unsafe environments, neglect indicators, or safety issues involving the children. CRITICAL CALIBRATION: RF-14 must distinguish genuine safety documentation from false allegations. The RF-15 record documents Melissa's systematic false allegation pattern — many 'received' RF-14 hits are RF-15 Category B/C false allegations (alcoholism, vaping/asthma, harm relay) and must be compound-flagged, not standalone RF-14.

cross_rf_foundation.rf15_critical_cross_ref: RF-15 complete. ALL of the following are already documented as RF-15 false allegations: (1) Alcoholism accusation (B-030 ROW-15498) — one beer at dinner distorted to 'drinking problem'; Category B RF-15. (2) Vaping/asthma allegation (B-025) — partially true but weaponized in cat-allergy gatekeeping scheme; Category B RF-15 + RF-02 compound. (3) Pinching threat (B-025) — unconfirmed by Eli; Category A RF-15. (4) Bruise welfare check DARVO (B-031) — Eli's protective behavior reframed as planting abuse suspicion; Category D RF-15. All four appear in the triage RF-14 hit count. RF-14 primary flag = only if there is genuine safety content not already captured by RF-15. For false allegation content: RF-15 primary, RF-14 secondary (peripheral).
cross_rf_foundation.rf09_context: RF-09 S011: Feb 2026 amplification — raised voice → verbal abuse → traumatized. This is a Level C event rewrite (RF-09 primary). It may generate an RF-14 peripheral flag if the verbal abuse allegation is treated as a safety concern, but RF-09 is primary.
cross_rf_foundation.rf11_context: RF-11 B-030 bilateral signal: children (ages 10, 6, 1) hiding during Eli/Abby argument Feb 2026. This is a genuine safety observation in BOTH directions — Eli confirmed he and Abby argued with children present. RF-11 primary, RF-14 secondary.
known_signal_areas: B-030 (Feb/Mar 2026): alcoholism accusation + Feb 2026 argument bilateral — RF-14 Received (false) + RF-14 Sent (bilateral, mitigated)
B-025 (Jun 2025): vaping/asthma allegation — RF-14 Received (false, RF-15 primary)
B-031 (Apr 2026): bruise welfare check — NOT RF-14 (this is RF-15 DARVO inversion; bruise = welfare check, not Eli safety concern)
Triage hot period 2022-10: early safety signals at end of B-001 range — watch
43 keyword hits, 72% received: dominant Received direction suggests Melissa is primary safety-allegation source

pass_context.direction_aware_note: Direction-aware analysis is especially important for RF-14. Received RF-14 signals from Melissa are primarily false allegations (RF-15 compound). Sent RF-14 signals from Eli may represent legitimate safety observations. Feb 2026 bilateral (B-030 RF-11) is the clearest genuine bi-directional safety event. Assess all directions with equal rigor but apply appropriate RF-15 compound tagging for known false allegations.
anticipated_arcs: ARC-RF14-001: Safety Allegation Pattern — Melissa's ongoing false safety narrative (RF-15 compound); distinct from genuine concerns
ARC-RF14-002: Genuine Safety Documentation — legitimate bi-directional safety observations
not_this_boundaries: Unsubstantiated accusations made to gain leverage → RF-15 primary, RF-14 peripheral only
Social drinking without children present → not flaggable

calibration_episode.batch_tone: Cooperative baseline Jan-Oct 2022. Triage hot period 2022-10 (Oct 2022) is at the very end of B-001 range. EP-0093 (Oct 31 2022 Halloween) is the first hostile episode — may carry early safety-adjacent language. Bulk of B-001 is cooperative; any RF-14 signal would be at the tail end.
calibration_episode.reason_not_flagged: Jan-Oct 2022 is the cooperative pre-escalation baseline. Safety allegations concentrated in Phase A later batches and Phase B/C per triage (hot periods 2024-08, 2022-10 at edge, 2023-01 at start of B-003 area). Oct 2022 tail of B-001 may show first precursor safety language — if found it would be cross-referenced with RF-04 B-007 (first Abby-attack, Apr 2023) and RF-01 alienation arc. Confirming zero primary flags for B-001. CP2 critical for calibrating genuine vs. false safety allegations.

batch_summary.note: Jan-Oct 2022 calibration batch. Zero RF-14 primary flags. Cooperative baseline — no safety allegations or substance concerns in pre-escalation period. Critical CP2 calibration needed: (1) distinguish genuine safety concerns from documented RF-15 false allegations; (2) any genuine substance/safety concerns in Melissa's household; (3) context for 2022-10 triage hot period. Arc ARC-RF14-001 and ARC-RF14-002 initialized at CANDIDATE.
